notes: Live codex-cli 0.144.5 /permissions model-permissions dialog. Anchor: the header 'Update Model Permissions' — the footer ('Press enter to confirm or esc to go back') is assembled upstream from template fragments with key names injected, so it is NOT a usable anchor. Menu: '› 1. Ask for approval (current)' (highlighted with the '›' marker; the '(current)' suffix marks the preset in effect, which is NOT the same as the highlight), '2. Approve for me', '3. Full Access'; each row carries a wrapped description in a second column separated by a double-space gutter, which cleanLabel trims off. Recorded from a ready composer after skipping the update notice; the dialog was backed out with ESC — Enter was never pressed, because it commits the highlighted preset to ~/.codex/config.toml.
